writer.name: Juan Sebastian Granados Juan Sebastian Granados

this_title: Los Briceño, una familia todo terreno Season 1
introduction: This is the story of "La Chiqui", the youngest daughter of a family of truckers. In this universe of trucks, where macho men, popular music and roadside love stories rule, "La Chiqui" gets pregnant. Her father kicks her out of her family home, forcing her to face a world where no one believes in her because she is a woman. However, she will manage to get ahead with her job, becoming a respected woman in her guild.
foreign_title: Los Briceño, una familia todo terreno Season 1
